svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:

- _observers: list" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="260" x="100" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ subscribe(o: Observer)
+ unsubscribe(o: Observer)
+ notify_observers(producto)
+ descontar_stock(pid, cantidad)
+ get_alertas_stock()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="260" x="100" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="<<interface>>
Observer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="700" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ update(producto: dict)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="700" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="AlertaStockObserver" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="560" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ update(producto: dict)
 - activa alerta visual
 - marca alerta_stock = True" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="560" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="InventarioObserver" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="830" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="+ update(producto: dict)
 - refresca lista productos
 - llama get_alertas_stock()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="230" x="830" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=15;" value="Client (ventas/views.py)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="100" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="add_venta()
 → descontar_stock()
 → notify_observers(producto)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="100" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=ERmanyToOne;endFill=0;startArrow=ERmandOne;startFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;" target="5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="815" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#000000;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#555555;" target="9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 210px; margin-left: 1px;
